ValidationRule.description: Only Milad can directly set Sales Director. Other users get this value from the LO's User.Manager.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(BEGINS($User.Username, "mromaya@axenmortgage.com")), NOT(ISBLANK(Sales_Director__c)), OR( ISBLANK(LO__c), Sales_Director__c <> LO__r.ManagerId ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only Milad can directly edit Sales Director. For everyone else, it is automatically set from the LO's Manager.
